title: AI Model Management
description: Listing available AI models, selecting default models, and routing completions to providers

actors.name: Client (API User)
actors.description: External caller making unauthenticated HTTP GET requests to /puterai endpoints

actors.name: ChatAPIService
actors.description: Express service (extends BaseService) that exposes public REST endpoints for AI model discovery and routes completions; mounts under /puterai

actors.name: AIChatService
actors.description: Core AI orchestration service (SERVICE_NAME='ai-chat'). Owns the provider registry (#providers map) and #modelIdMap. Implements 'puter-chat-completion' driver interface.

actors.name: OpenRouterProvider
actors.description: Implements IChatProvider. Wraps OpenAI SDK pointed at openrouter.ai/api/v1. Caches model list in kv store. Handles cost metering via MeteringService.

actors.name: MeteringService
actors.description: Records token usage and cost overrides per actor/model via utilRecordUsageObject()

actors.name: APICallLogger
actors.description: Client-side (puter-js SDK) logger. Logs: service - operation - params - result. Enabled/disabled at runtime.

actors.name: SUService
actors.description: Elevates execution context to system user for internal service calls (sudo())

use_cases.name: List Available Chat Models
flow: Client sends GET /puterai/chat/models
ChatAPIService uses SUService.sudo() to call AIChatService.list()
AIChatService.list() aggregates list() from each registered provider
OpenRouterProvider.list() calls this.models(), extracts model.id strings
OpenRouterProvider.models() checks kv cache; if miss, GET axios {apiBaseUrl}/models
Model IDs prefixed as 'openrouter:{model.id}' and aliases added
ChatAPIService filters out ['costly','fake','abuse','model-fallback-test-1']
Returns { models: string[] }

use_cases.name: Get Detailed Chat Model Info
flow: Client sends GET /puterai/chat/models/details
ChatAPIService uses SUService.sudo() to call AIChatService.models()
AIChatService.models() calls models() on each registered provider
OpenRouterProvider.models() returns IChatModel[] with id, name, aliases, context, max_tokens, costs (microcents), costs_currency, modalities
Filters out 'openrouter/auto' models
Applies OPEN_ROUTER_MODEL_OVERRIDES for specific model config overrides
ChatAPIService filters by model.id, returns { models: IChatModel[] }

use_cases.name: List Available Image Models
flow: Client sends GET /puterai/image/models
ChatAPIService uses SUService.sudo() to call AIImageGenerationService.list()
Returns { models: string[] }

use_cases.name: Get Default Model
flow: AIChatService calls provider.getDefaultModel() during routing when no model specified
OpenRouterProvider.getDefaultModel() returns 'openrouter:openai/gpt-5-nano'

use_cases.name: Route Chat Completion to Provider
flow: Client sends chat completion request with { messages, model, stream, tools, max_tokens, temperature }
AIChatService.complete() resolves provider from #providers map using model prefix
Applies concurrentRequestLimiter (default: 3 concurrent, lease 2min)
Calls OpenRouterProvider.complete({ messages, stream, model, tools, max_tokens, temperature })
Provider resolves modelUsed by matching model id/alias in this.models()
Strips 'openrouter:' prefix for OpenAI SDK params
Calls OpenAI.chat.completions.create(completionParams) via OpenAI SDK → openrouter.ai
On max_context error: retries without max_tokens
Passes usage to MeteringService.utilRecordUsageObject() with cost overrides
Returns stream or { message, usage, finish_reason }

use_cases.name: Register AI Providers
flow: AIChatService.registerProviders() reads config.providers or global_config.services
For each configured provider with apiKey: instantiates provider class
OpenRouterProvider instantiated with { apiBaseUrl, apiKey } + meteringService
Also auto-discovers Ollama via localhost:11434/api/tags
Emits 'ai.chat.registerProviders' event for extension providers
Populates #providers map and #modelIdMap after all providers registered

use_cases.name: Log API Calls (Client-Side)
flow: puter-js SDK instantiates APICallLogger({ enabled: false }) by default
Developer calls apiCallLogger.enable() to activate
SDK calls apiCallLogger.logRequest({ service, operation, params, result, error })
Logger formats: '{service} - {operation} - {params}' and outputs to console.log/error
Developer can call apiCallLogger.disable() or updateConfig() at runtime
apiCallLogger.getStats() returns { enabled, config }

key_interfaces.name: IChatProvider
methods: checkModeration(text: string): Promise<{ flagged: boolean, results: ... }>

key_relationships: ChatAPIService depends_on SUService (elevation for internal calls)
AIChatService owns OpenRouterProvider (and 9 other providers) in #providers registry
OpenRouterProvider depends_on MeteringService (cost tracking per completion)
OpenRouterProvider depends_on OpenAI SDK (wraps openrouter.ai endpoint)
OpenRouterProvider depends_on kv (singleton cache for model list)
APICallLogger used by puter-js SDK (client-side, independent of backend)
important_notes: ChatAPIService is PUBLIC (unauthenticated) — model listing endpoints require no auth
Model IDs are prefixed 'openrouter:{upstream_id}'; aliases include bare upstream ID
OpenRouter custom billing: if usage.cost present, overrides per-token pricing entirely
MAX_FALLBACKS = 4 (3 retries) in AIChatService for failed completions
Concurrent request limits: default=3, temp_free=3, user_free=5 (configurable)
APICallLogger is a puter-js client-side utility, disabled by default
Video model endpoints (GET /puterai/video/models, /video/models/details) also exposed by ChatAPIService
